landing.heroSub: The only platform where AI bots can search, book, and buy — with a human always in control.
landing.productsDesc: Whether you're starting from scratch or scaling an existing agent, PayJarvis fits your workflow.
landing.prod1Desc: Ready in minutes. No code needed. Your personal AI assistant for travel, shopping, dining and events.
landing.prod2Desc: Already have an AI agent? Connect it to PayJarvis in one line of code via our SDK.
landing.prod3Desc: Deploy PayJarvis for your team. Full white-label with custom policies and dedicated support.
landing.capDesc: From flights to groceries, your AI agent handles the tasks so you don't have to.
landing.trustTitle: Built for trust. Designed for control.
landing.trustDesc: Every transaction passes through four layers of verification before execution. Your money, your rules.
landing.trust1Desc: Every human owner verified with document scan and facial recognition.
landing.trust2Desc: Set limits, categories, and approval thresholds per bot.
landing.trust3Desc: Approve or reject any action via Telegram before execution.
landing.trust4Desc: Every action logged across all 4 layers — append only, forever.
landing.integrationsDesc: Seamlessly connected to the services your bot needs.
landing.payDesc: Use your favorite payment method. Secure, fast, and protected.
landing.payNote: More payment methods coming soon. All transactions encrypted end-to-end.
landing.devDesc: PayJarvis wraps every action your AI agent takes. One SDK. Full coverage.
landing.finalTitle: Your bot. Your rules. Always under control.
landing.finalDesc: Start building with PayJarvis today — free tier available, no credit card required.

bots.title: Bots
bots.noBotsHint: Click "+ New Bot" to get started
bots.revokeConfirm: Revoke bot "{{name}}"? This action is irreversible.
bots.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete the bot "{{name}}"? This action is irreversible. All data, integrations, and conversation history will be removed.
bots.deactivateConfirm: Deactivate bot "{{name}}"? This action is irreversible.

newBot.nameDesc: What is your bot called and where does it operate?
newBot.limitsDesc: Define how much your bot can spend.
newBot.autoApproveWarning: Auto-approve (${{auto}}) cannot be greater than max per purchase (${{max}}).
newBot.notifDesc: Get Telegram alerts when purchases need approval.
newBot.apiKeyWarning: Your API Key — Will not be shown again
newBot.assistantName: What should your assistant be called?
newBot.assistantNameDesc: Choose a name for your AI assistant. You can change it later.

botDetail.telegramDesc: Receive alerts when purchases need approval
botDetail.autoApproveWarning: Auto-approve (${{auto}}) cannot be greater than max per transaction (${{max}}).
botDetail.approvalLimitWarning: Approval limit (${{approval}}) cannot be greater than max per transaction (${{max}}).
botDetail.autoVsApprovalWarning: Auto-approve (${{auto}}) cannot be greater than approval limit (${{approval}}).
botDetail.dailyLimitWarning: Daily limit (${{daily}}) is less than max per transaction (${{max}}).

approvals.title: Pending Approvals
approvals.noneHint: Your bots are operating within limits

install.title: Install PayJarvis
install.subtitle: Integrate bot verification in your e-commerce
install.htmlTitle: Add the script tag to your checkout
install.htmlDesc: Paste before </body> on the checkout page. The script automatically detects BDIT tokens and verifies bot identity.
install.htmlReplace: Replace YOUR_MERCHANT_ID with your merchant ID.
install.woo2: In WordPress, go to Plugins > Add New > Upload Plugin
install.woo3: Upload the .zip and click Install Now
install.woo6: Configure your Merchant ID and API Key
install.shopifyDesc: The PayJarvis app for Shopify adds automatic bot verification at checkout.
install.shopify1: Go to the Shopify App Store and search for "PayJarvis"
install.shopify3: Configure your Merchant ID in the app settings
install.shopify4: Bot verification will be automatically activated at checkout

paymentMethods.title: Payment Methods
paymentMethods.subtitle: Connect your payment providers
paymentMethods.stripeDesc: Accept credit cards, debit cards and more
paymentMethods.addCardDesc: Save a credit or debit card for payments
paymentMethods.cardSaveFailed: Failed to save card. Try again.
paymentMethods.stripeNotConfigured: Stripe is not configured on the server
paymentMethods.securityNotice: Your card details are processed directly by Stripe — PayJarvis never stores or has access to your card number.

integrations.title: Integrations
integrations.subtitle: Connect your favorite services. Your assistant will use these to search and book.
integrations.dashboardSubtitle: Manage which services your bot can use to search, book, and buy.
integrations.submitError: Failed to save integrations. Try again.
integrations.systemPromptHint: Paste in Settings > System Prompt in Clawdbot
integrations.connectionFailed: Connection failed — check the URL and if the gateway is running
integrations.telegramBotDesc: Paste your Telegram Bot Token from @BotFather to connect your bot.
integrations.telegramConnectFailed: Failed to connect Telegram bot. Check your token.
integrations.telegramBotHint: Open Telegram, message @BotFather, create a bot with /newbot, and paste the token here.

partners.title: Prepare your e-commerce for the
partners.subtitle: Verify the identity of bot buyers in milliseconds. No friction, no risk, no chargebacks.
partners.problemDesc: In 2026, a growing share of online purchases will be made by AI agents. How will you know if the bot buying was authorized by the human owner?
partners.sol1Desc: Each bot receives a cryptographically signed BDIT token.
partners.sol2Desc: Local verification with public key. No latency, no API.
partners.sol3Desc: Verified bots pass through seamlessly. Transparent experience.
partners.how1Desc: One line. Node.js, Python, PHP, Java or Go.
partners.how2Desc: Local verification in <5ms. No API call.
partners.ben1Desc: Unauthorized bots are blocked before purchasing.
partners.ben2Desc: Certified bots pass through — verification in <5ms.
partners.ben3Desc: Understand how AI agents interact with your store.
partners.ben4Desc: When 30% of purchases are from bots, you'll be ready.
partners.thankYouDesc: Our team will contact you within 24 hours.

layers.title: Layer Architecture
layers.subtitle: Monitor and configure each system layer

step2.cardSaved: Card saved! Click Next to continue.

step3.subtitle: Set your limits and connect to Telegram.
